mapper.select: SELECT id, site, sku, product_name, profit_rate, return_rate, lowest_price, lowest_item_number, lowest_upload_time, oe_number, tracking_price, tracking_profit_margin, floor_price, remark FROM ebay_product_dedup
mapper.update: UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET profit_rate = #{rate} WHERE site = #{site} AND sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{middleCode}, '%') LIMIT 1
UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET return_rate = #{rate} WHERE site = #{site} AND sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{middleCode}, '%') LIMIT 1
UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET return_rate = #{rate} WHERE sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{middleCode}, '%')
UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET lowest_price = #{price}, lowest_item_number = #{itemNumber}, lowest_upload_time = NOW() WHERE site = #{site} AND sku = #{sku}
UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET oe_number = #{oeNumber} WHERE site = #{site} AND sku = #{sku}
UPDATE ebay_product_dedup SET remark = #{remark} WHERE site = #{site} AND sku = #{sku}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ebay_product_dedup (site, sku, product_name) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(l.site_name, ''), l.site_code), l.sku, MAX(l.title) FROM ebay_product_listing l WHERE l.sku IS NOT NULL AND l.sku != '' AND (l.site_name IS NOT NULL AND l.site_name != '' OR l.site_code IS NOT NULL AND l.site_code != '') GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(l.site_name, ''), l.site_code), l.sku ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = VALUES(product_name), site = VALUES(site)
